reviews.review_description: It only took me moments to find another player! I love the atmosphere. I'm a 1500 rated chess player  and I had no problem finding a challenge within my rating. Highly recommended!

This is the first app I have not refunded because this app has something other chess apps lack: players! Since it is offered online, not everyone is on VR which I get they can’t control but having an option to only play with other VR players would be cool so talking could be an option. Or giving the ppl on mobile a mic option?? Plz make the piece colors extremely different as this can cause confusion at times… overall I will keep this app. The best in metaquest so far ..add me prettylady813
Always somebody online to play with. Wish talking would be possible. Why not 5 min games?

I bought it because i truly believe there is a huge potential! Please deliver more environments, the one is great but at least 4 variations would be great! I dont want to register an account, please activate to login with the meta account or allow a profile edit without account. I hope my buying will support more updates. I hope this game will be as awesome as i expect!

developer_response.body:
Hi, we're already working on the login/profile features and hope to have them ready in the next release. Also some more environments should be available in the next few weeks.
Thanks for the feedback and the support, it certainly helps to push the game forward!

reviews.review_title: Nice but some improvements if possible?
reviews.review_description:
Piece colors are too close.
The board is just under my head so I have to bend forward to play, which is somewhat difficult.  Is it possible to adjust this?
On meta q 3.

developer_response.body: Hello, you should be able to fix this by holding the "Oculus" button on the right controller for about 3 seconds. This would reposition the board to match your position better. Hope this helps! If not, feel free to reach us at support@chesshold.com and we'll see what we can do. Cheers!

reviews.review_description: Good game I got it when it was free but I don't know what kind of insane person or what mental illness you would have to have to buy it 2 dollars tops so don't buy it
Got it free

reviews.review_title: Not bad but buggy and very limited
reviews.review_description: I appreciate the new updates to give some basic game review capabilities and puzzles but there is an annoying bug in the game that happened to me at least 5 times. When you play black, and queens are off the board, when you move your king to d8 and then move it somewhere else, you see a new queen sitting in d8 that cannot be moved or removed and it's very annoying. It happened multiple times in exact situation and makes the game unplayable. Please fix this bug.

developer_response.body: Hi, thanks for reporting this. We'll investigate it and will provide a fix in the next update.

reviews.review_title: If you're a beginner for chess.
reviews.review_description: This game is great! Some bugs throw me off, but it's really fun and calming after I play games where people scream in my ear 24/7

This game is free compared to some other chess games so it is a good starter. You can play against the CPU with different difficulties or your friends, and has hand tracking if you want a more realistic experience. Overall I rate this a 5 star because I don’t see anything bad with it. It’s good for a nice, calm environment and it is great to play with your friends!
💙samzy bio link💙 great game put dots in spaces
for me the board is underneath my floor is there anyway to fix this

One of your earlier reviewers provided an update after your response, which you apparently didn't see. The update pointed out a multiplayer problem. The game displays a message saying that it's waiting for the opponent when both players are there.

I also noticed that I can't see the entire board. Is that because I'm reclined?
Stunning scenery, great options and a superb calm environment. Its chess and it is what it is, but hay great job team. 👍🏼

developer_response.body: Thank you, really glad you like it!

reviews.review_title: Awesome if you are a fan of chess
reviews.review_description: This game is pretty simple, but it was a lot more entertaining than I expected. The environment is cool, although I would like to see more later on. The grabbing of the pieces is weird, but that barely deterred my playthrough. Awesome game, 10/10.

developer_response.body:
Hi, thanks a lot for the feedback, it's great to see a first review like that! :) We'll be adding a number of updates in the next few weeks that should fix the grabbing issue and introduce some new features. We'll also try to spice the environment up a bit with things like environmental sounds, etc.

Cheers!

reviews.review_description:
I used to play chess outside with a buddy.  This app reminds me of those days.  I only have had one issue.  I can't seem to figure out how to castle. It seems like it will let me because when I move one piece the computer doesn't go, like it's waiting for me to finish. I use both hands as I would in real life.  But it would not castle.  Im sure I'll figure it out.

Edit to developers response:
I knew it was something simple! Thank you for responding! I was just thinking too complicated.  Plus im still having trouble with the "glowing spaces of possibility." My brain has trouble with them while I'm moving 😅 I didn't even notice the king had longer range when I tried.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the review, really glad you like it!

In order to castle, you need to move the kind 2 squares to the side, after that the rook will move automatically. The video on this page actually shows that at 00:13s.

However there are a couple of standard rules that determine if castling is possible:
1) the king must not be in check or end up in check after the castling.
2) The king cannot pass through an attacked square.
3) Both the king and the rook have not moved previously.

If castling is possible, then when you pick up the king, you'll see it can move 2 squares to the side, otherwise it will be able to move just 1.

Cheers!

reviews.review_description: I tryed all chess games on quest 3.

So far this is the best chess game I've found on quest.  It's basic chess but it works well, the environment is really nice and relaxing and there are plenty of players to be matched with since it also matches you with mobile phone players.
As a big chess fan it feels sooo cool to be in such a soothing environment while being able to play chess with my hands in vr. Nothing to complain tho more environments would be great!

developer_response.body:
Thank you for the nice review, really glad you like it!
We hope to be able to release more environments soon.

reviews.review_description: I like this app but when I try to play with a friend it doesn’t let them make a move just puts them in a black screen
